div.class: o-mail-Chatter o-portal-Chatter w-100 h-100 flex-grow-1 d-flex pt-2

div.t-att-class: { 'col-lg-5':this.twoColumns() and !this.displayRating, 'col-lg-4': this.displayRating, 'col-xl-3 ps-0': this.displayRating and this.twoColumns(), 'position-sticky':this.composer() }
div.t-att-style: (!this.twoColumns() and this.inFrontendPortalChatter and !this.env.projectSharingId) and 'top: -1px !important; margin-top:-15px; padding-top: 20px'

div.t-att-class: { 'col-lg-6 offset-lg-1': this.twoColumns() and !this.displayRating, 'col-lg-8 px-0': this.displayRating, 'offset-xl-1': this.displayRating and this.twoColumns() }
